items.title: GTA 6 Just Got A Jaw-Dropping Sales Prediction
items.summary: Everyone knows that Rockstar's GTA 6 is going to be an enormous hit upon launch in November this year, but just how big are we talking? A new report from research firm Newzoo makes several stratospheric predictions, led by an estimation that it could earn between $3.3 billion - $5.2 billion in global sales after jus…

items.title: "It's not that we don't care about PC" - Former Rockstar developer suggests why GTA 6 is only coming to consoles at launch
items.summary: GTA 6 is looming like that monolith in 2001: A Space Odyssey, casting its fearsome shadow over the games industry and probably also scaring some monkeys. But PC players won't be able to join in the fun when Rockstar Games ' mega-sequel launches on 19th November, and former studio producer John Ricchio - who worked o…

items.title: Modern Warfare 4 lead isn't scared of the GTA 6 black hole: 'It’s a little head-to-head, that’s great'
items.summary: "It’s a lot of pressure to make sure that you’re creative enough to entertain the masses."

items.title: Ex-PlayStation boss says devs need to reach people who don't care about GTA 6, even if Rockstar's long-awaited game is going to hit "with great force and power"
items.summary: "We need to bring out more games for more people, which means actually you have to have more people making games"

items.title: GTA 6's Lack of a PC Port Isn't Out of Greed, According to a Former Rockstar Producer
items.summary: A former Rockstar Games producer has explained why the developer's PC versions usually come long after the console version.

items.title: GTA 6 isn't on PC at launch because it's 'always better to start with the constraints', suggests former Rockstar producer
